message:
fix(web): Remove developer-facing SQLite/Zustand loading message

Remove the "SQLite loaded via sql.js. Data flows into the shared
Zustand store" message from the UI. This was a UX anti-pattern -
end users don't know what SQLite, sql.js, or Zustand are.

The database loading/error panel now only shows when actually
loading or when there's an error, not when successfully loaded.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
